meaning: adj.不在的,缺席的,缺少的;vt.缺席
examples: "Nothing," Rosie said in an absent way.
She was absent for nine consecutive days.
The pictures, too, were absent from the walls.
The usual coffee shop frills are also conspicuously absent: there are no cakes, salads or sandwiches.
With Blair on the bench and Cusiter absent, Glasgow lock Alastair Kellock will captain the side.
